response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum requirements with a Bachelor's degree and over 15 years of software engineering experience, his profile aligns more with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer than a Director-level AI Strategy Principal. He lacks the preferred advanced degree in AI, deep historical expertise in artificial intelligence, and a track record of driving enterprise-level cloud and AI strategy.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software engineering experience across diverse technology stacks.
Entrepreneurial experience as the founder of Northwind Labs, demonstrating builder fluency.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
Missing demonstrated experience operating in a Director-level strategic or advisory capacity.
Core background is heavily focused on full-stack web development and GIS rather than deep AI/ML thought leadership.
